roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of PRCS PC 3455, PC 1203.2

/CAL: DEFT BAIL MOTION- RELEASE ORDER/VD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE OF 5-21-20 IN DEPT, 23/3455TERM/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO TERMINATE PRCS IN THIS CASE ,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION ORDER OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN 19018507
/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC 3455/PD/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/WIAPRCS/CONTD:TO SET APD 3455PC PRCS AND JOIN 19018507 IN D-9/DOP/
/CAL: TS APD 3455PC/NP/X: PER BAILIFF, DEFENDANT IS 4011,5/CONT/X: 03-18-20/DOPC/
